description: Site-specific data items for kidney/renal cell carcinoma, AJCC 8th Edition. Includes grade and histologic features.

items.name: ISUP/WHO Grade (2017+)
items.description: ISUP/WHO nuclear grade for clear cell and papillary RCC
items.clinical_significance: Higher grade associated with worse prognosis

items.name: Fuhrman Nuclear Grade (Historical)
items.description: Fuhrman nuclear grade (historical, replaced by ISUP/WHO)
items.note: Fuhrman grading replaced by ISUP/WHO grading in 2017

items.name: Sarcomatoid Features
items.description: Presence and extent of sarcomatoid differentiation
items.valid_codes: 000=No sarcomatoid features, 001-100=Percentage of sarcomatoid component, XX8=Not applicable, XX9=Unknown

items.name: Tumor Necrosis
items.valid_codes: 0=No necrosis, 1=Necrosis present (focal), 2=Necrosis present (extensive), 3=Necrosis present NOS, 8=Not applicable, 9=Unknown
items.clinical_significance: Tumor necrosis associated with worse prognosis

items.name: Renal Vein Involvement
items.valid_codes: 0=No renal vein involvement, 1=Renal vein involvement (microscopic), 2=Renal vein involvement (gross), 3=Renal vein involvement NOS, 8=Not applicable, 9=Unknown

items.name: IVC Tumor Thrombus
items.valid_codes: 0=No IVC involvement, 1=Below diaphragm, 2=Above diaphragm, below right atrium, 3=Extends into right atrium, 4=IVC involvement NOS, 8=Not applicable, 9=Unknown
items.clinical_significance: IVC involvement affects staging and surgical approach

items.name: Perinephric Fat Invasion
items.valid_codes: 0=No perinephric fat invasion, 1=Perinephric fat invasion present, 8=Not applicable, 9=Unknown

items.name: Adrenal Gland Involvement
items.valid_codes: 0=No adrenal involvement, 1=Direct invasion of adrenal, 2=Separate adrenal metastasis, 3=Both direct invasion and metastasis, 8=Not applicable, 9=Unknown

items.name: Histologic Subtype
items.description: Histologic subtype of renal cell carcinoma

additional_biomarkers_to_extract.name: VHL Mutation Status
additional_biomarkers_to_extract.description: VHL gene mutation status (relevant for clear cell RCC)

derived_fields.name: IMDC Risk Category
derived_fields.description: International Metastatic RCC Database Consortium risk category
risk_factors: Time from diagnosis to treatment <1 year
Corrected calcium > upper limit of normal
